title: OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A statewide network of certified health care providers that ensure access to a variety of reproductive health services. Services include annual gynecological exams, pap tests, breast exams, STI screening and treatment. Offers pregnancy testing, birth control counseling, contraception, emergency contraception and abortions. 801 Pacific Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Individuals with an income below 250% FPL Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm (503) 842-3900 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 842-3900 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Low cost or free based on service, insurance will be billed if applicable. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Abortion Referrals Birth Control Counseling Breast Examinations Contraception Emergency Contraception General Sexuality/Reproductive Health Education Pap Tests Pregnancy Testing Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - HEALTH SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEDICATION ASSISTED TREATMENT FOR SUBSTANCE USE DISORDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TILLAMOOK COUNTY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTERS CENTRAL COUNTY HEALTH CENTER
